title: Cursed Relics Dungeons
description: Cursed Relic Dungeons adds dangerous dungeons filled with secrets, traps, and hidden relic weapons with unique abilities. Explore hidden structures, discover powerful rewards, and survive deadly encounters.
body:
🏰 Cursed Relic Dungeons

Cursed Relic Dungeons is an exploration and combat-focused mod that adds dangerous dungeons filled with secrets, traps, and powerful cursed relics.

⚔️ Explore. Discover. Survive.

Deep within your world lie forgotten structures, hiding powerful relics and treasures that are not easy to obtain. Every dungeon is filled with danger, hidden paths, and unique rewards for players who explore carefully.

🔥 Features

🏰 Custom dungeons with unique layouts and themes
🕳️ Hidden entrances and secret rooms (fake walls, traps, and hidden passages)
⚔️ Powerful relic weapons with unique abilities
🛡️ Custom weapons, tools, and equipment
👹 Custom mobs and dungeon enemies
🧱 Custom blocks used for dungeon generation and atmosphere
🧩 Jigsaw-based structure generation system
🗡️ Relic Weapons

Each dungeon contains powerful relics with unique abilities that can change the way you fight. These weapons are hidden deep within the structures and require exploration and skill to find.

🧭 Secrets are everywhere

Dungeons are not obvious — discovery is a key part of the experience:

Fake walls that blend into the environment
Trap blocks that hide entrances
Secret rooms behind structures
Hidden paths and puzzles inside dungeons
💡 Inspiration

Some textures are inspired by the mod Born in Chaos. Huge respect to its creator — go check it out, it’s an amazing mod!

⚠️ Note

This mod is still in development and will continue to receive new dungeons, relics, and features in future updates.
